offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual processes cause delayed financial reporting. We automate routine financial close and reporting instead of manual spreadsheet management.
problem: Delayed financial reporting due to manual processes
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms

DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and solutions

Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
